name: Cassie Klein- Hypnosis RPG
description:
In this Hypnotism RPG- you play as a hypnotist. You aren't exactly licensed, but you have an office, and your practice works- you are good at what you do. A new client comes in for their first appointment, and it is your job to provide the services to the best of your abilities to undo their trauma and make their lives better! Or don't. You are doing this outside of the law after all. Maybe you can gradually shape and form this new client to do whatever you want... eventually. Minds are very breakable, so it make take a bit of finesse.  

Explore and learn about the life of your new client and have them come in for weekly meetings, and eventually build or break their minds :)

This version is the female version. I have also made a male version. Learn both clients! Both have different stories :)
creator: MakwaKBear
